Nima Rousseau(father)Unnamed grandparents † She is a self-assured girl, who is wise beyond her years and has mysterious connections to the history ofSnowpiercer. She is the daughter ofMelanie Cavilland was believed dead for seven years. characters.description: Andre LaytonBiographical InformationAge36 (Season 1,Season 2&Season 3)37 (Season 4)GenderMaleBirthdayApril 30th, 1990[5]StatusAliveCharacter InformationClassTailie(formerly)Pirate Train(formerly)New EdenAlias(es)'Dre (byZarah)Tailie Detective (byJakes Carter)[1]Train DetectiveWilford's pet detective (byOz)[2]Son (byMr. Riggs)[3]King Layton (byJoseph Wilford)[4]OccupationHomicide Detective (formerly)Train Detective(formerly)Revolution Leader (formerly)Compost Worker onBig Alice(formerly)Leader of thePirate Train(formerly)ActingBreachman(formerly)Leader ofSnowpiercer(formerly)CouncilmanofNew Eden(formerly)Co-Chairman of the New Eden Town CouncilLanguage SpokenEnglishRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed mother †Unnamed brother †Miles(foster son)Liana Layton(daughter)Romance(s)Zarah Ferami† (ex-wife)Josie Wellstead(girlfriend)FriendsBess TillMelanie CavillPike(formerly) †Javier De La TorreBennett Knox†Murray†Alexandra CavillRuth WardellJosie WellsteadSykesSam RocheEnemiesJohn Osweiller(formerly)Nolan Grey†Robert Folger†Lilah Folger†LJ Folger†Terence†Joseph Wilford†Pike†Anton Milius†Nima Rousseau†Rat†PortrayalPortrayerDaveed DiggsAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1•Season 2•Season 3•Season 4First AppearanceLast AppearanceFirst, the Weather ChangedLast Stop Tailie Detective (byJakes Carter)[1]Train DetectiveWilford's pet detective (byOz)[2]Son (byMr. Riggs)[3]King Layton (byJoseph Wilford)[4] Andre Laytonis a main character inTNT'sSnowpiercer,portrayed byDaveed Diggs. characters.name: Astrid
characters.description: AstridBiographical InformationGenderFemaleStatusAliveCharacter InformationClassTailie(formerly)3rd Class(formerly)New EdenOccupationFood Processing Worker (formerly)Head of Food Services (formerly)Language SpokenEnglishRelationshipsFriendsAndre LaytonJosie WellsteadZ-WreckPortrayalPortrayerJane McGregorAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1•Season 2•Season 3•Season 4First AppearanceLast AppearanceWithout Their MakerLast StopAstridis a recurring character onTNT'sSnowpiercer. She is portrayed byJane McGregor. Astrid was originally a Tailie, but was chosen for apprenticeship years ago. She has been without contact with the Tail Section for two years, but recent events renewed her collaboration with the Tailies. Josieapproaches her on her break and she reveals to Josie thatLaytonis up Train to solve the murder ofSean Wise. Josie askes her to make contact with him. She starts to worry because she can be caught, but Josie tells her that the Tail needs her. Then she gives her food to Josie. Later that day she sends a message to Josie that Layton is missing.

characters.description: Bess TillBiographical InformationGenderFemaleEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlondeHeight5'7StatusAliveCharacter InformationClass3rd Class(formerly)2nd Class(formerly)SnowpiercerPirate Train(formerly)Big Alice(formerly)New EdenAlias(es)TillOccupationDetroit Cop (formerly)SnowpiercerBrakeman (formerly)Wilford's Adviser (formerly)Crewmember on thePirate Train(formerly)Train Detective(formerly)LeadBrakemen(formerly)Acting Engineer onBig Alice(formerly)New EdenmetalworkerLanguage SpokenEnglishRelationshipsRomance(s)Jinju Seong(ex-girlfriend)Mira(one night stand)Miss AudreyFriendsAndre LaytonJosie WellsteadSam RocheBennett Knox†Ruth WardellJohn OsweillerEnemiesJohn Osweiller(formerly)Erik Sotto†Nolan Grey†Joseph Wilford†Miss Audrey(formerly)Anton Milius†Nima Rousseau†PortrayalPortrayerMickey SumnerAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1•Season 2•Season 3•Season 4First AppearanceLast AppearanceFirst, the Weather ChangedLast Stop Bess Francis[1]Tillis a main character inTNT'sSnowpiercer. She is portrayed byMickey Sumner. She is a thoughtful, empathetic, and savvyBrakemenwho is part of the train's security force. She finds herself at the center of a mystery that rocks the train’s uneasy status quo. She later becomes a member ofAndre Layton's revolution. In Season 2, Layton promotes her to his old job ofTrain Detective.

characters.name: Brakeman Fuller
characters.description: Brakeman FullerBiographical InformationGenderMaleStatusAliveCharacter InformationClass3rd Class(formerly)OccupationBrakemenLanguage SpokenEnglishRelationshipsFriendsJohn OsweillerPortrayalPortrayerBenjamin Charles WatsonAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1First AppearancePrepare to BraceBrakeman Fulleris a supporting character onTNT'sSnowpiercer. He is portrayed byBenjamin Charles Watson. Little is known about Fuller, other than he is abrakemanaboardSnowpiercer. InPrepare to Brace, he was on a shift guarding the Tail withJohn Osweiller. He watchedPattersongivingJohn Osweilleroral sex in exchange for medication to dullSuzanne's pain. Fuller warned John that they will send more Breakmen for the blackouts and that there's someone coming their way so John and Patterson could stop.

Snowpiercer(formerly)Big Alice(formerly)New Eden Marked on the blacklist of the train, which either marks her to be drawered to survive should the train fail, or marks her as a enemy, Pelton is the doctor responsible for overseeing patients that are awoken from stasis and finds herself dragged into the drama surrounding Melanie and Layton post-suspension. She is shown to be a supporter of the revolution and overthrowing the current administration.

characters.name: Erik Sotto
characters.description: Erik SottoBiographical InformationAge30sGenderMaleStatusDeceasedCause of DeathAxed to death byJackbootsCharacter InformationClass1st ClassOccupationBodyguard of the FolgersLanguage SpokenEnglishRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed Father †Unnamed Brother †Lilah Folger†Robert Folger†LJ Folger†Romance(s)LJ Folger†FriendsLJ Folger(girlfriend, partner in crime) †EnemiesAndre LaytonPortrayalPortrayerMatt MurrayAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1First AppearanceLast AppearanceFirst, the Weather ChangedWithout Their MakerErikis a recurring character in thefirst seasonofTNT'sSnowpiercer. He is portrayed byMatt Murray. A loyal bodyguard and protector toLJ Folger, it is eventually revealed that he is the killer aboardSnowpiercer, albeit under the influence of LJ.[1] Little is known about Erik's early life, other than his humble beginnings and hatred for his white father. After enlisting in the Marines, he was hired as Private Security forLJ Folgerfollowing the extinction event.[1]

characters.name: Fergus McConnell
characters.description: Fergus McConnellBiographical InformationGenderMaleStatusAlivePortrayalPortrayerBenjamin HaighAppears inSnowpiercerFergus McConnellis a main character inSnowpiercer'spilot episode, All That Remains. He is portrayed byBenjamin Haigh. He is a passenger who lives in the back of the train amongst poverty. He helps his mother care for his sick father, and does his best to contribute to the daily struggles of life in this part of the train.

characters.name: Icy Bob
characters.description: Icy BobBiographical InformationAge38GenderMaleEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlack (formerly)NoneHeight6'8StatusUnconfirmedCharacter InformationClassBig AliceAlias(es)Icy BobOccupationAugmented Breachmen/BodyguardLanguage SpokenEnglishPortrayalPortrayerAndre TricoteuxAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 2First AppearanceLast AppearanceThe Time of Two EnginesThe Eternal EngineerIcy Bobis a recurring character onTNT'sSnowpiercer. He is portrayed byAndre Tricoteux. Icy Bob is a (2.1 m) augmented human male aboard theBig Alicewho acts asJoseph Wilford’s personal bodyguard. His augmentation allows him to withstand freezing temperatures which would instantly freeze a normal human. Icy Bob is first introduced in Season 2 during the Rebel Army's storming of Big Alice. He pushes back single-handedly, injuring numerous Tailees bare-handed, before eventually cutting them off from the second train by venting cold air from the outside into a car. He is able to survive the cold due to his synthetic skin grafts.

He is portrayed byRoberto Urbina. He is one of the main Engineers onboard Snowpiercer working in the engine room alongside Melanie and Ben.[1]During the revolution, Javi initially sides with the Folgers and Commander Grey, but later helps Melanie to escape execution, allowing her to helpAndre Laytonand the Tail to win.

characters.name: John Osweiller
characters.description: John "Oz" OsweillerBiographical InformationGenderMaleEye ColorBrownStatusAliveCharacter InformationClass3rd Class(formerly)New EdenAlias(es)OzBrakeman Blowie (byThe Last Australian)Wean (byBuffalo)OccupationBrakemen(formerly)Janitor (formerly)HeadJanitor(formerly)Nightcar Manager (formerly)Security Officer for New EdenDe FactoHead of Security for New Eden (formerly)RelationshipsRomance(s)LJ Folger† (ex-wife)FriendsSam RocheLJ Folger†Bess TillBuffaloBojan BoscovicEnemiesJosie Wellstead(formerly)Lights(formerly)Anton Milius†Nima Rousseau†Wolf†PortrayalPortrayerSam OttoAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1•Season 2•Season 3•Season 4First AppearanceLast AppearanceFirst, the Weather ChangedLast StopJohn Christopher "Oz" Osweilleris a main character onTNT'sSnowpiercer. He is portrayed bySam Otto. He is a youngBrakemenand police-type figure of the train. After abandoning his post during Layton's revolution, he reluctantly accepts janitorial work fromTerencesoon after the return ofJoseph Wilford. After Terrence's death, Oz takes over the department. Oz grew up with a mother who was a mean drunk and even worse sober.[1]He used to be a soccer player, as a midfielder before the freeze. He comes from the East Midlands in England.[2]

characters.name: Josie Wellstead
characters.description: Josie WellsteadBiographical InformationGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownHeight5'3StatusAliveCharacter InformationClassTailie(formerly)Pirate Train(formerly)New EdenAlias(es)Cold WomanJosephine (byWilford[1])JosieOccupationVeterinarian (formerly)Freeze augmented BreachmanCrewmember on thePirate Train(formerly)Language SpokenEnglishRelationshipsFamilyMiles(foster son)Romance(s)Andre Layton(boyfriend)Bennett Knox† (one-night stand)FriendsWinnieBig John†LightsBess TillBennett Knox†EnemiesMelanie Cavill(formerly)Joseph Wilford†Mrs. HeadwoodAnton Milius†Nima Rousseau†PortrayalPortrayerKatie McGuinnessAppears inSnowpiercer (TV Series)•Season 1•Season 2•Season 3•Season 4First AppearanceLast AppearanceFirst, the Weather ChangedLast StopJosie Wellsteadis a main character onTNT'sSnowpiercer. She is portrayed byKatie McGuinness. She is a strong, no-nonsense woman who lives in poverty at the tail of the train. Josie's downfall at the hands ofMelanie Cavillis a mere example of the extreme lengths Cavill will go to protect her secret. InSeason 2, it's discovered that Josie is actually still alive, severely frostbitten, and labeled as a Jane Doe in the Second Class Clinic.
